title: Ukraine, Short on Troops, Is Turning to Robots to Help Its War Efforts
summary_full: Ukraine is using unmanned ground vehicles armed with bombs, guns or rockets to carry out attacks and keep its soldiers out of harm’s way.
summary_public: Ukraine is using unmanned ground vehicles armed with bombs, guns or rockets to carry out attacks and keep its soldiers out of harm’s way.

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: Ukraine Is Turning to Robots to Help Its War Efforts
